# PERF-063 negative: validator engine is cached at startup
lang: go
file: PERF-063-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin/binding"
	"gopkg.in/go-playground/validator.v10"
)

var (
	engine     *validator.Validate
	engineOnce sync.Once
)

func cachedEngine() *validator.Validate {
	engineOnce.Do(func() {
		engine = binding.Validator.Engine().(*validator.Validate)
	})
	return engine
}

func ValidateCached(c *gin.Context) {
	eng := cachedEngine()
	_ = eng
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
